JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO SEP-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 04

9:25AM DEPT. 4, JOSEPH DESMOND C/C FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WITNESS DAN FABIAN SWORN & EXAMINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #1 - 3 DAY NOTICE. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF: RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 630 GEARY ST. APT. 533. LEASE FORFEITED. RENTS AND DAMAGES $1316.38. COSTS PER COST BILL. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE JUDGMENT. MOTION TO WITH DRAW EXHIBIT - GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALIMI, M. A. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 630 GEARY ST. APT. 533 $1,316.38 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,316.38, LEASE FORFEITED
